workflow.name: MySQL Group Replication HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate MySQL Group Replication HA across existing member nodes with bash command steps.

data.label: Prepare MySQL Group Replication HA node runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[container-runtime] %s\n' "$*"; }
if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "docker is already installed"
  docker --version
  exit 0
fi
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with apt"
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with dnf"
  dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log "installing docker with yum"
  yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
else
  echo "Unsupported package manager. Install Docker manually." >&2
  exit 1
fi
systemctl enable --now docker
docker version

data.label: Render MySQL Group Replication HA node configuration
data.command:
set -euo pipefail

log() { printf '[mysql_group_replication_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
detect_current_ip() {
  for candidate in $(hostname -I 2>/dev/null); do
    case " 10.0.1.11 10.0.1.12 10.0.1.13 " in
      *" $candidate "*) printf '%s' "$candidate"; return 0 ;;
    esac
  done
  ip -o -4 addr show scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{split($4,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit}'
}
CURRENT_IP="${OCTASTACK_NODE_IP:-$(detect_current_ip)}"
NODE_NAME="$(hostname -s)"
NODE_ROLE="unknown"
NODE_INDEX=0
case "$CURRENT_IP" in
  10.0.1.11) NODE_NAME='mysql-01'; NODE_ROLE='mysql'; NODE_INDEX=1 ;;
  10.0.1.12) NODE_NAME='mysql-02'; NODE_ROLE='mysql'; NODE_INDEX=2 ;;
  10.0.1.13) NODE_NAME='mysql-03'; NODE_ROLE='mysql'; NODE_INDEX=3 ;;
esac
if [ "$NODE_ROLE" = "unknown" ]; then
  log "unable to match current host IP ($CURRENT_IP) to the generated topology"
  exit 1
fi
log "running on $NODE_NAME ($CURRENT_IP, role=$NODE_ROLE)"

install -d -m 0750 /opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha
install -d -m 0750 /var/lib/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha
cat >/opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/.env <<EOF
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=change-me
MYSQL_DATABASE=app_db
MYSQL_USER=app_user
MYSQL_PASSWORD=change-me
OCTASTACK_NODE_NAME=$NODE_NAME
OCTASTACK_NODE_ROLE=$NODE_ROLE
OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX=$NODE_INDEX
CURRENT_IP=$CURRENT_IP
FIRST_NODE_IP=10.0.1.11
CLUSTER_PEERS=10.0.1.11,10.0.1.12,10.0.1.13
SEED_IPS=10.0.1.11,10.0.1.12,10.0.1.13
MYSQL_GROUP_SEEDS=10.0.1.11:33061,10.0.1.12:33061,10.0.1.13:33061
EOF
chmod 0600 /opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/.env

cat >/opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/compose.yml <<'COMPOSE'
services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.4
    container_name: octastack-mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - .env
    command: >
      mysqld
      --server-id=${OCTASTACK_NODE_INDEX}
      --report-host=${CURRENT_IP}
      --gtid-mode=ON
      --enforce-gtid-consistency=ON
      --binlog-checksum=NONE
      --log-bin=mysql-bin
      --log-slave-updates=ON
      --binlog-format=ROW
      --transaction-write-set-extraction=XXHASH64
      --loose-group-replication-group-name=aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa
      --loose-group-replication-start-on-boot=OFF
      --loose-group-replication-local-address=${CURRENT_IP}:33061
      --loose-group-replication-group-seeds=${MYSQL_GROUP_SEEDS}
      --loose-group-replication-ip-allowlist=10.0.0.0/16
    volumes:
      - data:/var/lib/mysql
volumes:
  data: {}
COMPOSE
log "configuration rendered"

data.label: Deploy MySQL Group Replication HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
log() { printf '[mysql_group_replication_ha] %s\n' "$*"; }
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/compose.yml pull
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/compose.yml up -d
docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mysql_group_replication_ha/compose.yml ps
      log "node deployment complete"

data.label: Initialize MySQL Group Replication HA node
Document MySQL Group Replication HA topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/mysql_group_replication_ha-topology.md <<'EOF'
# MySQL Group Replication HA

Members:
- mysql-01: 10.0.1.11 (mysql)
- mysql-02: 10.0.1.12 (mysql)
- mysql-03: 10.0.1.13 (mysql)

Three MySQL members run native Group Replication with GTID, row-based binary logging, and a deterministic primary bootstrap.
EOF
cat /tmp/mysql_group_replication_ha-topology.md

data.label: Validate MySQL Group Replication HA node
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
docker exec octastack-mysql mysql -uroot -pchange-me -e "SELECT MEMBER_HOST, MEMBER_STATE, MEMBER_ROLE FROM performance_schema.replication_group_members;"

data.label: MySQL Group Replication HA health check
